answers.where: Battle test on the bright Roblox-like block arena.
answers.action: Move with WASD and use the equipped rocket module with E.
answers.response: The shoulder hardpoints now visibly become amber rocket pods with cyan caps after purchase.
answers.reward: The player can see the bought shoulder module on the mech, so salvage spending changes the character silhouette.
answers.game_look: Textured toy mech, visible modular shoulder pods, block baseplate, studs, colored props, readable HUD.

issues.text: Hardpoints are still an overlay pass; a later hero model should bake these modules into authored mesh parts.
